name: Fourth of July Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8 ounces each) reduced fat cream cheese, softened
1 package (3 ounces) reduced fat cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crumbs, margarine, and 3 tablespoons of NutraSweet in a medium bowl; pat evenly on the bottom of a 15 x 10 inch jelly roll pan.
2. Sprinkle gelatin over milk in a small saucepan; let stand 2 to 3 minutes. Heat over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until gelatin is dissolved. Cool to room temperature.
3. Beat cream cheese until fluffy in a large bowl. Gradually beat in milk mixture. Beat in lemon juice, rind, vanilla, and 1/3 to 1/2 cup of NutraSweet Spoonful.
4. Pour the mixture over the crust; refrigerate until set, 3 to 4 hours.
5. Before serving, decorate to look like a flag using blueberries for stars and raspberries for stripes.
Makes 16 servings.
A patriotic salute to classic cheesecake, this party-sized dessert is decked out with blueberry and raspberry stars and stripes.
From "The NutraSweet Spoonful Recipe Collection", 1992.
